title: Create: Synthesis
description: A modpack that combines Vanilla+ with Create Mod (as well as a little bit of magic)
body:
# Create: Synthesis
This modpack, created originally for a server, aims to just simply be fun.

## Mods
Note: This is not every single mod in the pack, just the more important ones.
<details>
<summary>Gameplay</summary>

These mods greatly effect gameplay of Minecraft

- Create Mod: engineering and technology
- Better Combat + Simply Swords: Combat and Weapon overhaul
- YUNG's Mods: overhaul of vanilla structures
- Tectonic: overhaul of world generation
- Decorative Blocks, Supplementaries: adds many different building blocks to the game
- Fabric Seasons: adds seasons to the game
- You're in Grave Danger: adds gravestones to the game when you die, saving your items
- Farmer's Delight Refabricated: adds many new crops and foods to the game
- Inmis: adds backpacks to the game

</details>


<details>
<summary>Vanilla+</summary>

These mods just make some small QoL changes to the game

- AdditionZ, VanillaRefresh, VanillaTweaks: all of these mods make miscellaneous additions to the game
- AmbientSounds and Auditory Continued: adds misc sounds into the game
- Artifacts: adds artifacts to the game that give the user unique abilities, and can only be found in loot chests
- Trinkets: works with Create, Artifacts, and Inmis to provide extra inventory slots for those items
- Banner Flags, More Banner Features: adds more uses for banners
- AudioPlayer: allows for the creation of custom music discs
- BlossomHomes, adds a /home command, configurable by server
- Botany Pots, adds pots that you can grow crops in
- Carry On, carry mobs, players, and chests
- Comforts, adds sleeping bags, hammocks and other changes to sleeping in Minecraft
- Easy Anvils, Easy Magic: respectively changes how anvils and enchanting tables work
- Ender Dragon Fight Remastered: Overhauls the Ender Dragon fight
- Elytra Slot: adds a slot to Trinkets for Elytra
- Figura: allows players to create custom BlockBench models to use as skins
- Lootr: makes player specific loot chests, so even if someone loots something before you, you still get loot
- More Mob Variants: adds variants of mobs
- Not Enough Animations, Eating Animation: Adds misc animations to the game that should be in vanilla
- Smarter Farmers: farming villagers replant crops
- Simple Voice Chat: adds voice chat

</details>


<details>
<summary>Performance + Bugs + Additions</summary>

Mods to gain as much performance as possible, fix bugs, and add more non-gameplay related features

- Animatica
- AntiGhost
- Auth Me
- Bad Wither No Cookie
- Bad Optimizations
- Better F3
- Blur
- Bobby
- Borderless Mining
- CIT Resewn
- Capes + Wavey Capes
- Chat Heads
- Clumps
- Connectivity
- Controlling
- Cull Less Leaves
- Debugify
- Dynamic FPS
- Enchantment Descriptions
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- FabricSkyboxes + FabricSkyboxes Interop
- FastAnim
- FastQuit
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Jade
- Jade Addons
- JourneyMap
- Just Enough Breeding
- Just Enough Effect Descriptions
- Just Enough Items
- Just Enough Professions
- Krypton
- Language Reload
- LazyDFU
- LibreExpFix
- Lithium
- MC-249136 Fix
- Model Gap Fix
- ModernFix
- More Chat History
- Mouse Tweaks
- No Chat Reports
- OptiGUI
- PolyMorph
- Puzzle
- RecipeCooldown
- Reese's Sodium Options
- ReplayMod
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Starlight
- Zoomify
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- ClientCrafting
- e4mc
- leaky

</details>
